name: gh
description: GitHub CLI — create PRs, manage issues, review code from the container

prerequisites.description: GitHub personal access token (classic or fine-grained)

entrypointCommands: if [ -f /secrets/github-token ]; then gh auth login --with-token < /secrets/github-token 2>&1 >&2 || true; gh auth setup-git 2>&1 >&2 || true; git config --global url."https://github.com/".insteadOf "git@github.com:"; git config --global url."https://github.com/".insteadOf "git@github.com-personal:"; git config --global url."https://github.com/".insteadOf "git@github.com-fusion:"; fi

setupInstructions: Create a GitHub personal access token at https://github.com/settings/tokens and save it to ~/.config/nanoclaw/github-token (just the token string, no quotes)
